  "society_power": 3.5,
  "state_power": 3.5,
  "society_change": -1.5,
  "state_change": 1.0,
  "key_event": "Taif Agreement and sectarian power dynamics",
  "reasoning": "The Taif Agreement ended the civil war but entrenched sectarianism, weakening civil society. State power increased slightly with the re-establishment of central governance."
